actionCalls.description: Updates ownership of newly created Experience Curriculum opportunity using round robin
actionCalls.name: Assign_EC_Owner
actionCalls.label: Assign EC Owner

decisions.description: Checks if the account associated with the opportunity already has an active user assigned as the SaaS and Billing Upsell owner.
decisions.name: Accounts_Needs_Assignment
decisions.label: Accounts Needs Assignment?

decisions.description: Decides on the next steps based on whether a Combined Funnel was found or not.
decisions.name: Combined_Funnel_Exists
decisions.label: Combined Funnel Exists?

decisions.description: checks to see if its a net new licensee or an long term existing customer that does not have a combined funnel/onboarding (likely fully activated a long time ago)
decisions.name: Customer_Type
decisions.label: Customer Type?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Net New Licensee/ Previously Canceled Customer

decisions.description:
Identifies 'Customer Type' based on the 'Number of Sites' field on the opportunity.
*may need custom error or validation rule on number of schools on licensee opps to ensure it goes down a path
decisions.name: Customer_Type_Assessment
decisions.label: Customer Type Assessment

decisions.description: If EC Demo Event is found/scheduled, then update the owner of the EC Opportunity to the same Rep
decisions.name: EC_Demo_Event_Found
decisions.label: EC Demo Event Found?

decisions.description: Since contacts for SaaS and Billing Primary Contact are different, check if there's any contact tagged as Billing Primary Contact. If there is, update that contact's field "Onboarding Billing Primary Contact" to true only.
decisions.name: Existing_Different_Billing_Contact
decisions.label: Existing Different Billing Contact?

decisions.description: Checks the value on the field "Interested In BW Learning" on the CW opportunity is "Yes".
decisions.name: Interested_In_BW_Learning
decisions.label: Interested In BW Learning?

decisions.description: Checks if the contact assgined as the SaaS Primary Contact and Billing Primary Contact on the opportunity is the same
decisions.name: Same_SaaS_And_Billing_Primary_Contact
decisions.label: Same SaaS And Billing Primary Contact?

Flow.description: When a Government opportunity moves to the 'Closed Won' stage, this flow creates the Combined Funnel and Onboarding records for the account. Additionally, it creates child records for multi-site accounts. 01/29/24 - PE - Added the "Raise Montana Conversion" path. 02/01/24 - PE - Added decision node to evaluate if there's a contact tagged on the opportunity so the flow can relate it to child accounts. 3/1/24- Added in additional path for existing customers that become gov licensees, this path was inclduded in the old flow "CF - SaaS Opp CW - Create Combined Funnel and Onboardings " and needed to be added into this one 03/13/24 - Updated Combined Funnel OBC assignment path and updated child account creation decision node logic. 04/18/24 - PE - Updated flow to launch account assignment for SaaS/BU owners if needed 05/22/24- JH 2024 refinements https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Vq9KTZn28WAbGXKpCN8l93OQopUmQvVXeNsTlt0OJs8/edit#gid=0 WORKING 5/30 06/20/24 - PE - Updated value for Billing Onboarding Status on CF. 07/16/24 - PE - Removed references to field Subisidy Tracking, Declined Billing Training and Declined Billing Training Reason 07/19/24 - PE - Added subflow after main billing and saas onboarding records are created. 08/12/24 - PE - Mapped OBC Owner, OBC Call Scheduled Date and OBC Call Completed Date to accounts. 08/28/24 - PE - New mapping for field "Number of Total Staff" 09/11/24 - PE - Added element to stamp created combined funnel to CW opportunity. 09/24/24 - BW - Added existing EC Opp check before creating another EC Opp 09/27/24 - PE - Added "Goverment Close Date" mapping to child accounts. 01/14/25 - PE - Updated logic to populate Original Close Date on account 01/29/25 - PE - Updated logic to populate Original Close Date on account 02/10/25 - BW - Added update to Most Recent Gov CW Opp on the Account 02/12525 - PE - Added subflow to create OB Attempts 05/02/25 - PE - Updated the flow to remove elements from the async path that were responsible for creating child records. 05/19/25 - AC - Removed references to Account Status field. 05/22/25 - AC - Removed references to the Onboarding - Subflow - Sync With School Object flow. 07/18/25 - AC - Edited to remove Billing Status at CW from the Update Combined Funnel node 08.04.2025 - LK - Updated Combined Funnel Formula so that for self-serve and declined training , the owner is standard onboarding queue if OBS is entered 08/12/2025 - LK - Added Logic for EC Opp Ownership to check for EC Demo 09/25/2025 - BW - Added logic to populate Winback Dates based on School Object data 12/24/2025 - AC - Added mapping of Billing Activation Start Date on Update Account nodes. 2/5/26- DM - Removed references to 'OBC Owner' field (deprecating field) 2/11/26 - AC - Removing mapping of Billing Activation Start Date on Update Account nodes.

formulas.name: forBillingWinback
forSaaSWinbackDate
forT_CombinedFunnel_Owner
formulas.expression: IF( OR( {!$Record.Declined_SaaS_Training__c} = True, {!$Record.Declined_Billing_Training__c}= True ), '00GPB000001orzp2AA', IF( AND( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Onboarding_Path__c},'Standard'), ISBLANK({!$Record.OBS_Owner__c}) ), '00GPB000001orzp2AA', IF( AND( ISBLANK({!$Record.OBS_Owner__c}), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Onboarding_Path__c},'Self Serve')) ), '00G3u000002egpzEAA', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Onboarding_Path__c},'Self Serve'), '00GPB000001orzp2AA', {!$Record.OBS_Owner__c} )) ))

formulas.name: forT_MainBillingOnboarding_Name
formulas.expression: IF( LEN({!$Record.Account.Name} & ' - Billing Onboarding') > 80, LEFT({!$Record.Account.Name} , 80 - LEN(' - Billing Onboarding')) & ' - Billing Onboarding', {!$Record.Account.Name} & ' - Billing Onboarding' )

formulas.name: forT_MainCombinedFunnelName
formulas.expression: IF( LEN({!$Record.Account.Name} & ' - Combined Funnel') > 80, LEFT({!$Record.Account.Name} , 80 - LEN(' - Combined Funnel')) & ' - Combined Funnel', {!$Record.Account.Name} & ' - Combined Funnel' )

Flow.interviewLabel: Opportunity - Gov CW - After Save - Create Combined Funnel and Onboarding Records {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Opportunity - Gov CW - After Save - Create Combined Funnel and Onboarding Records

recordCreates.description: Create a new Experience Curriculum Upsell opportunity
recordCreates.name: Create_EC_Opportunity
recordCreates.label: Create EC Opportunity

recordCreates.description: Create a new Billing Onboarding record from the closed won opportunity.
recordCreates.name: Create_Main_Billing_Onboarding_Record
recordCreates.label: Create Main Billing Onboarding Record

recordCreates.description: Create a new SaaS Onboarding record from the closed won opportunity.
recordCreates.name: Create_Main_SaaS_Onboarding_Record
recordCreates.label: Create Main SaaS Onboarding Record

recordCreates.name: Link_Billing_Handoff_Note_to_Combined_Funnel
recordCreates.label: Link Billing Handoff Note to Combined Funnel

recordCreates.name: Link_SaaS_Handoff_Note_to_Combined_Funnel
recordCreates.label: Link SaaS Handoff Note to Combined Funnel

recordLookups.description: Checks if there's any Combined Funnel record associated with the opportunity's account.
recordLookups.name: Check_for_Combined_Funnel
recordLookups.label: Check for Combined Funnel

recordLookups.description: If EC Demo is Scheduled then we want to assign the EC to the same rep
recordLookups.name: See_if_EC_Demo_Event_Exist
recordLookups.label: See if EC Demo Event Exist

recordUpdates.name: Copy_1_of_Update_Gov_Close_Date_on_Account
recordUpdates.label: Update Gov Close Date on Account

recordUpdates.description: If the contact for SaaS and Billing Primary Contact is the same, then set both fields "Onboarding Billing Primary Contact" and "Onboarding SaaS Primary Contact" to true.
recordUpdates.name: Set_Contact_As_SaaS_And_Billing_Primary
recordUpdates.label: Set Contact As SaaS And Billing Primary

recordUpdates.description: If the contacts for SaaS and Billing Primary Contact are different, then set the field "Onboarding SaaS Primary Contact" to true only.
recordUpdates.name: Set_Contact_As_SaaS_Primary
recordUpdates.label: Set Contact As SaaS Primary

recordUpdates.description: Now that the Combined funnel ownership has changed and Onboarding coordinator set, update these fields on the account to match those users.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Account_Owner
recordUpdates.label: Update Account Owner

recordUpdates.description: Update the EC Opportunity owner to the EC Demo Assigned to ID
recordUpdates.name: Update_EC_Opp_Owner
recordUpdates.label: Update EC Opp Owner

recordUpdates.name: Update_Gov_Close_Date_on_Account
recordUpdates.label: Update Gov Close Date on Account

recordUpdates.name: Update_Original_Close_Date_on_Account_if_Blank
recordUpdates.label: Update Original Close Date on Account if Blank
recordUpdates.filterLogic: (1 AND 2) OR (1 AND NOT(2) AND 3 AND 4) OR (1 AND NOT(2) AND NOT (4))

recordUpdates.description: Updates the parent account associated with the opportunity's account.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Parent_Account
recordUpdates.label: Update Parent Account

variables.description: Variable created as a dummy to allow the creation of a loop element
variables.name: varR_Account
